scripts.icons:build: svgr --no-prettier --typescript --icon --expand-props end --filename-case kebab --out-dir shared/icons shared/icons/raw && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const rawDir='shared/icons/raw';const outDir='shared/icons';const toKebab=(name)=>name.replace(/([a-z0-9])([A-Z])/g,'$1-$2').replace(/[ _]+/g,'-').toLowerCase();const toPascal=(name)=>name.split('-').filter(Boolean).map((part)=>part.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+part.slice(1)).join('');const files=fs.readdirSync(rawDir).filter((f)=>f.endsWith('.svg')).sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b));const lines=files.map((f)=>{const base=toKebab(f.replace(/\\.svg$/,''));return \"export { default as \"+toPascal(base)+\"Icon } from './\"+base+\"';\";});fs.writeFileSync(outDir+'/index.ts',lines.join('\\n')+'\\n');"
scripts.icons:sync: bun run icons:build && bun run icons:format
